## Stream type

Set of compatible, switchable tracks sharing a codec and media type. Discriminated by [MediaType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type Stream = {
    codec: string;
} & ({
    type: MediaType.VIDEO;
    width: number;
    height: number;
} | {
    type: MediaType.AUDIO;
});
```
**References:** [MediaType.VIDEO](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->, [MediaType.AUDIO](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)
